args.reason: Check the current PG&E balance, due date, cutoff/disconnection status, and any payment or dispute options.
Determine the authorized PG&E payment route and funding source needed to address the active cutoff notice.

args.question: Your PG&E account has an active cutoff notice, with $84.60 past due and a $146.30 total balance (due July 6, 2026). Would you like me to pay the past-due $84.60 or the full $146.30? Please also specify the authorized payment route and funding source (for example, bank account/ACH or debit/credit card).
args.reason: Payment amount and an explicit payment route/funding source are required to safely authorize and submit a PG&E payment; the billing-instruction lookup failed.
